body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
update to latest dependencies 

note: ClimaLSM v0.7.0 moves almost all bucket functions dispatching on `CoupledAtmosphere` into ClimaLSM so we can remove them here. However, two functions still need to be defined in ClimaCoupler. I've documented them here: #601 

note 2: this update causes functions using the `allskywithclear` radiation option to be unstable. See https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/issues/602 for more info.

closes #593
title: update to atmos v0.20, land v0.7, etc
